title: hypericum quadrangulum var. imperforatum
intro: Hypericum quadrangulum var. imperforatum, also known as Lesser St John's Wort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Hypericaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and depression, improving wound healing, and possessing antioxidant properties. Hypericum quadrangulum var. imperforatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
